hermes-duplicate-call: Warning shown on the rendered page when the #hermes parser function is used more than once on the same page. Refers to the wikitext parser function tag name, which is not translated.
hermes-duplicate-call-category: {{tracking category name}} Tracking category for pages with duplicate #hermes parser function calls.
hermes-duplicate-call-category-desc: Description on [[Special:TrackingCategories]] for the {{msg-mw|hermes-duplicate-call-category}} tracking category.
hermes-invalid-tag-name: Error shown when a tag passed to the #hermes parser function contains disallowed characters. * $1 - the invalid tag name, as entered by the user (not translated)
hermes-duplicate-tag-name: Error shown when the same tag is passed to the #hermes parser function more than once in a single call. * $1 - the duplicated tag name, normalized (not translated)
hermes-tag-conflict-category-desc: Description on [[Special:TrackingCategories]] for the {{msg-mw|hermes-tag-conflict-category}} tracking category.
hermes-tag-conflict-warning: Intro line of the warning box shown, at the bottom of the page, on a page that is itself (one of) the cause(s) of a Hermes tag conflict (see {{msg-mw|hermes-tag-conflict-category}}). Followed by a dynamically-built, untranslated list of "tag name: conflicting page titles". Only shown if $wgHermesWarnings is enabled.
hermes-ambiguous-links-category-desc: Description on [[Special:TrackingCategories]] for the {{msg-mw|hermes-ambiguous-links-category}} tracking category.
hermes-ambiguous-links-warning: Intro line of the warning box shown, at the bottom of the page, when this page's outgoing interlanguage links are ambiguous (see {{msg-mw|hermes-ambiguous-links-category}}). Followed by a dynamically-built, untranslated list of "tag name (language): candidate page titles". Only shown if $wgHermesWarnings is enabled.
hermes-invalid-project-title: Permission error shown when trying to create/move to a page title starting with "!" that doesn't match the reserved "!xx:Title" translation-project format, with "xx" being a language code for a registered translation project.
hermes-title-not-capitalized: Permission error shown when trying to create/move to/upload a translation-project page title whose first letter after the "!xx:" prefix isn't capitalized as required by $wgCapitalLinks (or a per-namespace $wgCapitalLinkOverrides).
hermes-project-hatnote:
Hatnote shown at the top of a translation-project page.
* $1 - the code of the project's language
